declarations.name: AndCard
declarations.description: A composable card component with optional sub-components for structured layouts.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes from the consumer.

attributes.name: padded
attributes.description:
Add built-in padding to the card.
Use `true` for simple content without sub-components.
Defaults to `false` so sub-components (header/content/footer) manage their own spacing.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Visual variant of the card.

members.name: customClass
members.description: Additional CSS classes from the consumer.

members.name: padded
members.description:
Add built-in padding to the card.
Use `true` for simple content without sub-components.
Defaults to `false` so sub-components (header/content/footer) manage their own spacing.

members.name: variant
members.description: Visual variant of the card.

attributes.name: active-item
attributes.description:
The active navigation item ID.
Reflects the headless‐core state.

attributes.name: aria-nav-label
attributes.description: ARIA label for the navigation

attributes.name: auto-collapse
attributes.description:
When `true`, the navbar automatically detects when the nav
items overflow and switches to a smaller responsive stage
regardless of breakpoints. Content-aware collapse.

attributes.name: compact-breakpoint
attributes.description:
Breakpoint (px) below which the end section enters compact mode
(icon-only, labels hidden). Main nav is still visible.

attributes.name: item-variant
attributes.description:
Visual style for individual nav links.
Controls how each link looks, independent of the navbar container variant.

- `default`   — subtle rounded pill with hover bg
- `underline`  — bottom-border indicator on active
- `filled`     — solid primary bg on active

attributes.name: items
attributes.description:
Navigation items to display.
When provided, the component renders its own items (with full
keyboard navigation, scroll-spy, and active‐indicator).
When empty, use the `nav` slot for custom content.

attributes.name: minimal-breakpoint
attributes.description:
Breakpoint (px) below which the main (nav links) section is hidden
and the navigation moves to the hamburger drawer.
Only start + compact end are visible.

attributes.name: mobile-breakpoint
attributes.description:
Breakpoint (px) below which the navbar switches to mobile mode
(hamburger menu). Set to `0` to always show desktop, or a high
value to always show mobile.

attributes.name: position
attributes.description: Positioning behaviour

attributes.name: scroll-spy
attributes.description:
Enable scroll-spy (auto-detect active section by scroll position).
Items must have `href` starting with `#`.

attributes.name: scroll-spy-offset
attributes.description: Scroll-spy offset from the top of viewport (px).

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Visual variant

members.name: activeItem
members.description:
The active navigation item ID.
Reflects the headless‐core state.

members.name: ariaNavLabel
members.description: ARIA label for the navigation

members.name: autoCollapse
members.description:
When `true`, the navbar automatically detects when the nav
items overflow and switches to a smaller responsive stage
regardless of breakpoints. Content-aware collapse.

members.name: compactBreakpoint
members.description:
Breakpoint (px) below which the end section enters compact mode
(icon-only, labels hidden). Main nav is still visible.

members.name: itemVariant
members.description:
Visual style for individual nav links.
Controls how each link looks, independent of the navbar container variant.

- `default`   — subtle rounded pill with hover bg
- `underline`  — bottom-border indicator on active
- `filled`     — solid primary bg on active

members.name: items
members.description:
Navigation items to display.
When provided, the component renders its own items (with full
keyboard navigation, scroll-spy, and active‐indicator).
When empty, use the `nav` slot for custom content.

members.name: minimalBreakpoint
members.description:
Breakpoint (px) below which the main (nav links) section is hidden
and the navigation moves to the hamburger drawer.
Only start + compact end are visible.

members.name: mobileBreakpoint
members.description:
Breakpoint (px) below which the navbar switches to mobile mode
(hamburger menu). Set to `0` to always show desktop, or a high
value to always show mobile.

members.name: position
members.description: Positioning behaviour

members.name: scrollSpy
members.description:
Enable scroll-spy (auto-detect active section by scroll position).
Items must have `href` starting with `#`.

members.name: scrollSpyOffset
members.description: Scroll-spy offset from the top of viewport (px).

members.name: variant
members.description: Visual variant

attributes.description: Current active page (1-based).

attributes.description: Total number of pages.

attributes.name: active-item
attributes.description: The active navigation item ID.

attributes.name: aria-nav-label
attributes.description: ARIA label for the navigation

attributes.name: collapsed
attributes.description: Whether the sidebar is collapsed (desktop).

attributes.name: collapsed-width
attributes.description:
Collapsed width of the sidebar.
Accepts any CSS value.

attributes.name: expanded-width
attributes.description:
Expanded width of the sidebar.
Accepts any CSS value.

attributes.name: item-variant
attributes.description:
Visual style for individual sidebar items.
Controls how each item looks, independent of the sidebar container variant.
Border-radius is intentionally not set — the theme controls it.

- `default`   — subtle accent bg on active
- `underline` — left accent bar on active
- `filled`    — solid primary bg on active

attributes.name: items
attributes.description:
Navigation items to display.
Items with `section: 'bottom'` render in the footer area.

attributes.name: mobile-breakpoint
attributes.description: Breakpoint (px) below which the sidebar auto-collapses on mobile.

attributes.name: mobile-collapse
attributes.description:
Enable auto-collapse on mobile viewports.
When true, the sidebar collapses to icon-only mode on screens
smaller than `mobileBreakpoint`.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Visual variant of the sidebar.

members.name: activeItem
members.description: The active navigation item ID.

members.name: ariaNavLabel
members.description: ARIA label for the navigation

members.name: collapsed
members.description: Whether the sidebar is collapsed (desktop).

members.name: collapsedWidth
members.description:
Collapsed width of the sidebar.
Accepts any CSS value.

members.name: expandedWidth
members.description:
Expanded width of the sidebar.
Accepts any CSS value.

members.name: itemVariant
members.description:
Visual style for individual sidebar items.
Controls how each item looks, independent of the sidebar container variant.
Border-radius is intentionally not set — the theme controls it.

- `default`   — subtle accent bg on active
- `underline` — left accent bar on active
- `filled`    — solid primary bg on active

members.name: items
members.description:
Navigation items to display.
Items with `section: 'bottom'` render in the footer area.

members.name: mobileBreakpoint
members.description: Breakpoint (px) below which the sidebar auto-collapses on mobile.

members.name: mobileCollapse
members.description:
Enable auto-collapse on mobile viewports.
When true, the sidebar collapses to icon-only mode on screens
smaller than `mobileBreakpoint`.

members.name: variant
members.description: Visual variant of the sidebar.

events.name: andSidebarItemClick
events.description: Emitted when a navigation item is clicked.

events.name: andSidebarToggle
events.description: Emitted when the sidebar collapse state changes.
